summary: Correct the Q-0001 Unicode-3.0 policy decision identifier without rewriting the immutable source entry: D-0131 is the authoritative identifier because D-0130 was already assigned to the C6 File-shortcut correction.

decisions.decision: Treat D-0131 as the authoritative identifier for the Unicode-3.0 allow-list decision recorded in 2026-07-11-q0001-unicode-license; its accidental D-0130 label is superseded because D-0130 already identifies the C6 File-shortcut correction.
decisions.rationale: Decision identifiers must remain unambiguous across the append-only clean-room record. Appending this correction preserves the immutable original entry while restoring a unique identifier.

testEvidence.test: Search the complete ledger for D-0130 and append a correction rather than modifying either committed historical record.

red.outcome: RED: D-0130 appeared in both the existing C6 File-shortcut correction and the new Q-0001 policy entry.

green.outcome: GREEN: Provenance ledger passed validation in PR append mode with the immutable correction and UI residual entries reconciling the exact 15-path commit diff.

questions: This entry changes no policy or product behavior; it only supplies the unique authoritative identifier D-0131 for the already-resolved Q-0001 decision.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
